stemHtml: An aircraft is cruising at an indicated altitude of 8500 feet with the altimeter subscale set to a QNH of 1030 hPa. During the flight, the local QNH decreases to 1010 hPa. Assuming a uniform vertical pressure variation with a lapse rate of 27 feet per hPa, determine the aircraft’s true altitude if the altimeter setting remains unchanged at 1030 hPa.
